description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner display, commonly used for promotional or informational purposes in public or commercial spaces. The front face features printed branding and text, including the company name 'GEMOPHORIUS healthcare' and several associated logos and website information, all arranged on a white background. The banner is supported by a metallic base with two stabilizing feet extending perpendicular to the main axis, providing balance and stability. The rear side is plain and unprinted, showing the structural support and the seam where the banner material is attached to the frame. The banner material appears to be a smooth, flexible synthetic fabric or vinyl, held taut by the top and bottom rails. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for indoor environments such as event halls, lobbies, or trade shows.
description: A freestanding vertical promotional banner with a printed front, metallic base, and stabilizing feet, designed for indoor display. The front features company branding and logos on a white background.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the thin profile of the banner and the cross-shaped metallic base with two stabilizing feet.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the printed banner face with company logos, text, and a website, as well as the metallic base and feet.
description_view_2: A bottom-up view similar to view 0, highlighting the slimness of the banner and the structure of the base.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the plain, unprinted back of the banner and the seam where the material is attached to the frame.
